answer:
Waterfall.io does not offer a free tier; it operates on a prepaid, usage-based model where you purchase credits to access B2B data services [1][2]. There are no long-term contracts or monthly commitments required [1][2][3].

For developer API access, you can sign up to receive an API key [3]. You authenticate requests by including this key in the header:

```bash
x-api-key: <your-api-key>
```

The base URL for API requests is `https://api.waterfall.io/v1/` [4]. While usage is billed, certain account-related reporting calls are free and do not consume credits [5][6].
